title: Globalisation and society
explanation:
Globalisation and society

  • migration, integration, diversity, trade, outsourcing
  • multinational, supply chain, cultural exchange, inequality
  • verbs: relocate, integrate, outsource, connect

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: Global ____ has changed labour markets in many countries. | *trade | weather | furniture
Cities with high ____ often have vibrant food and arts scenes. | *diversity | pollution | debt
Many firms ____ customer support to other countries. | *outsource | apologise | testify
Successful ____ requires language support and community programmes. | *integration | inflation | censorship

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option. Use each option ONLY ONCE.

questions.text: Economic ____ can create both opportunities and pressure on wages. | migration
A ____ corporation operates in dozens of countries. | multinational
The pandemic disrupted global ____ chains. | supply
The festival promoted cultural ____ between nations. | exchange
Some communities worry about rising social ____. | inequality

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The factory plans to ____ production to eastern Europe. | *relocate | recycle | perform
Schools help new arrivals ____ into local society. | *integrate | compete | forecast
Technology helps people ____ across continents instantly. | *connect | convict | depart
____ has made products cheaper but jobs more mobile. | *Globalisation | Censorship | Bankruptcy
